positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a magical forest gateway, viewed from a low angle. The composition is centered, featuring ancient, intertwined glowing root systems forming an ornate archway. Lush, ethereal bioluminescent flora illuminates the foreground and background, casting deep emerald, sapphire, and gold tones. The style is neo-art deco fantasy, clean lines, intricate detailing, suitable for a dark t-shirt print. Strong silhouettes and high contrast are essential. Cinematic volumetric lighting, minimal texture variation to ensure print fidelity.
